data.en: First, wash the potatoes and cut them into pieces.
data.cn: 首先，洗净土豆并切成小块。
accept: First, wash the potatoes and cut them into pieces.

data.en: Put the potatoes in a pot and boil them.
data.cn: 把土豆放入锅中煮沸。
accept: Put the potatoes in a pot and boil them.

data.en: Boil them until they are soft.
data.cn: 把它们煮到变软为止。
accept: Boil them until they are soft.

data.en: Get one tablespoon of butter.
data.cn: 拿一汤匙黄油。
accept: Get one tablespoon of butter.

data.en: Get half a cup of milk.
data.cn: 拿半杯牛奶。
accept: Get half a cup of milk.

data.en: Add the milk and the butter to the potatoes.
data.cn: 把牛奶和黄油加到土豆里。
accept: Add the milk and the butter to the potatoes.

data.en: Mix the butter with the potatoes.
data.cn: 将黄油与土豆混合。
accept: Mix the butter with the potatoes.

data.en: Finally, add salt and pepper.
data.cn: 最后，加入盐和胡椒粉。
accept: Finally, add salt and pepper.

data.en: How delicious they taste!
data.cn: 它们尝起来多么美味啊！
data.hint: 注意动词形式和标点符号。
accept: How delicious they taste!

data.en: Let's make some mashed potatoes for lunch.
data.cn: 我们午饭做些土豆泥吧。
accept: Let's make some mashed potatoes for lunch.

data.en: Can you teach me how to cook a popular Chinese dish?
data.cn: 你能教我怎么做一道受欢迎的中餐吗？
accept: Can you teach me how to cook a popular Chinese dish?

data.en: How about stir-fried eggs and tomatoes?
data.cn: 做西红柿炒鸡蛋怎么样？
accept: How about stir-fried eggs and tomatoes?

data.en: How do we make it?
data.cn: 我们该怎么做呢？
accept: How do we make it?

data.en: We need eggs, tomatoes, salt, and sugar.
data.cn: 我们需要鸡蛋、西红柿、盐和糖。
accept: We need eggs, tomatoes, salt, and sugar.

data.en: How many tomatoes and eggs do we need?
data.cn: 我们需要多少西红柿和鸡蛋？
accept: How many tomatoes and eggs do we need?

data.en: First, cut the tomatoes into small pieces.
data.cn: 首先，把西红柿切成小块。
accept: First, cut the tomatoes into small pieces.

data.en: Next, mix the eggs in a bowl.
data.cn: 接下来，在碗里把鸡蛋打匀。
accept: Next, mix the eggs in a bowl.

data.en: Heat some oil in a pan.
data.cn: 在平底锅里热一些油。
accept: Heat some oil in a pan.

data.en: Add the eggs to the hot pan.
data.cn: 把鸡蛋倒入热锅中。
accept: Add the eggs to the hot pan.

data.en: Stir-fry the eggs for one minute.
data.cn: 把鸡蛋翻炒一分钟。
accept: Stir-fry the eggs for one minute.

data.en: Take the eggs out of the pan.
data.cn: 把鸡蛋从锅里盛出来。
accept: Take the eggs out of the pan.

data.en: Cook the tomatoes until they are soft.
data.cn: 把西红柿煮到变软。
accept: Cook the tomatoes until they are soft.

data.en: Add some salt and sugar.
data.cn: 加一些盐和糖。
accept: Add some salt and sugar.

data.en: What an amazing smell it is!
data.cn: 多么迷人的香味啊！
data.hint: 注意动词形式和标点符号。
accept: What an amazing smell it is!

data.en: Put the eggs back into the pan.
data.cn: 把鸡蛋放回锅里。
accept: Put the eggs back into the pan.

data.en: Mix them with the tomatoes.
data.cn: 把它们和西红柿混合。
accept: Mix them with the tomatoes.

data.en: Wow, it looks so good!
data.cn: 哇，它看起来太棒了！
data.hint: 注意动词形式和标点符号。
accept: Wow, it looks so good!

data.en: How simple the recipe is!
data.cn: 这个食谱是多么简单啊！
data.hint: 注意动词形式和标点符号。
accept: How simple the recipe is!

data.en: Cooking is love made visible.
data.cn: 烹饪是看得见的爱。
accept: Cooking is love made visible.

data.en: I love cooking because of my grandmother.
data.cn: 因为我祖母，我爱上了烹饪。
accept: I love cooking because of my grandmother.

data.en: We create memories every time we sit at the table.
data.cn: 每次我们坐在桌旁，我们都在创造回忆。
accept: We create memories every time we sit at the table.

data.en: Smells and taste connect us to each other.
data.cn: 气味和味道把我们联系在一起。
accept: Smells and taste connect us to each other.

data.en: What wonderful memories I have!
data.cn: 我拥有多么美好的回忆啊！
data.hint: 注意动词形式和标点符号。
accept: What wonderful memories I have!

data.en: She always made pumpkin pie in autumn.
data.cn: 她总是在秋天做南瓜派。
accept: She always made pumpkin pie in autumn.

data.en: The smell of cinnamon filled the room.
data.cn: 肉桂的香气充满了房间。
accept: The smell of cinnamon filled the room.

data.en: She stayed with a host family in the US.
data.cn: 她在美国和一个寄宿家庭住在一起。
accept: She stayed with a host family in the US.

data.en: The hostess taught her how to make a pumpkin pie.
data.cn: 女主人教她如何制作南瓜派。
accept: The hostess taught her how to make a pumpkin pie.

data.en: Place the pie in the oven and cook it.
data.cn: 把派放进烤箱里烤。
accept: Place the pie in the oven and cook it.

data.en: Let the pie cool for at least an hour.
data.cn: 让派冷却至少一个小时。
accept: Let the pie cool for at least an hour.

data.en: Grandmother taught me the secret to cooking.
data.cn: 祖母教了我烹饪的秘诀。
accept: Grandmother taught me the secret to cooking.

data.en: Cook with love to make friends.
data.cn: 带着爱心烹饪来交朋友。
accept: Cook with love to make friends.

data.en: I love to try new food and recipes.
data.cn: 我喜欢尝试新的食物和食谱。
accept: I love to try new food and recipes.

data.en: How delicious the dish looks!
data.cn: 这道菜看起来多么美味啊！
data.hint: 注意动词形式和标点符号。
accept: How delicious the dish looks!

data.en: How clever you are to cook this!
data.cn: 你做这个多么聪明啊！
data.hint: 注意动词形式和标点符号。
accept: How clever you are to cook this!

data.en: First, cut the apples into pieces.
data.cn: 首先，把苹果切成小块。
accept: First, cut the apples into pieces.

data.en: Add the flour, salt, and sugar to the apples.
data.cn: 把面粉、盐和糖加到苹果里。
accept: Add the flour, salt, and sugar to the apples.

data.en: Pour the mixture into a pan.
data.cn: 把混合物倒入平底锅。
accept: Pour the mixture into a pan.

data.en: Share the pie with your friends.
data.cn: 和你的朋友分享这个派吧。
accept: Share the pie with your friends.

data.en: They put the toppings on flat bread.
data.cn: 他们把配料铺在扁平的面包上。
accept: They put the toppings on flat bread.

data.en: The ingredients depended on the area.
data.cn: 食材取决于地区。
accept: The ingredients depended on the area.
